name: fwe
description: A small generic file-workspace editor runtime.

scripts.syntax: node --check public/runtime.js && node --check public/graph.js && node --check public/inspector.js && node --check public/app.js && node --check public/views/workbench.js && node --check src/server.js && node --check src/dsl.js && node --check src/extensions.js
scripts.check: npm run syntax && node bin/fwe.js --check --app examples/app.fwe.json
